    Description
    BackgroundGradient
    Animates the background gradient of a pane based on the current difficulty tier.
    GameView
    Manages all visual output for the main game screen.

    Sets up and animates the loose screen.

    Manages the visual state of the main menu screen.

    Enum representing the available menu options.
    SceneManager
    Singleton that manages scene transitions on the primary Stage.
    Theme
    Central color palette and hex-conversion utility for the application's visual theme.
    TimerArc
    Renders a circular arc indicator that shrinks as the countdown timer decreases.
